case_title: CACH LLC VS. DANIEL O. LARSON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, DANIEL O.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY COLCLOUGH, III, ROBERT J.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, DANIEL O.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-16-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED FEB-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, DANIEL O.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-16-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, DANIEL O. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2012
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, DANIEL O.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
